verbatim_exchange.content:
RAIN7.docx
Dokument
[Start of Part 7 — continuation of previous part, no gap in time.] [End of Part 7 — immediately continues in next part. Do not respond yet, only confirm receipt.]

Receipt confirmed for Part 7.
Ready for the next part when you are.

synthesis.canonical_meaning: The user is providing a multi-part document and explicitly instructs the AI to confirm receipt of the current part and wait for the subsequent parts without further interaction, which the AI acknowledges.
belief_implications: The user manages the flow and pacing of content delivery and expects precise adherence to explicit procedural instructions.
The user prefers a structured, step-by-step interaction for multi-part tasks, with minimal AI intervention until prompted.

sensory_qualia.visual: A document icon appearing, text scrolling by, a confirmation message.
sensory_qualia.haptics: A brief, firm 'click' of a button, a sense of an item being checked off a list.
sensory_qualia.proprioception: A feeling of readiness and alignment, poised to continue a structured task.
sensory_qualia.kinetics: A paused, waiting stance; a sense of sequential, controlled progress.
sensory_qualia.atmosphere: Procedural, efficient, awaiting next instruction, calm anticipation.
